sourceReceipts.finding: The accepted HGI-301 source trace establishes deployable adapter topology only; its Vercel/provider readback was unavailable and it makes no production, webhook, credential, or handset claim.

Automatic Claude review runs for opened and synchronized pull requests, has read permissions plus id-token write, allows gh pr comment, and has no declared severity, deduplication, convergence, stopping, escalation, or cost contract.
Interactive Claude is mention-triggered and read-scoped in repository YAML; it is a distinct workflow from automatic review.
The audit matches exceptions by file, symbol, occurrence, and rule, records use, and reports unused entries as stale.
The registry is occurrence-based and includes multiple exact entries for one Upstash symbol; duplicate detection is covered by the focused tests.

github.limitation: This confirms repository Actions settings only, not workflow execution, token issuance, secrets, or Claude effectiveness.

vercel.finding: No local Vercel CLI or connected Vercel readback capability was available.
vercel.fallback: HGI-303 records a target-owned, authenticated read-only Vercel readback before any deployment claim; until then retain HGI-301's non-claim.

executor.finding: No local Executor CLI or connected readback capability was available.
executor.fallback: HGI-303 records connection-owned skills/status readback through the authenticated app connection; no alternate provider path is implied.

sendblue.finding: No local Sendblue CLI or authenticated readback capability was available.
sendblue.fallback: HGI-303 records an authenticated Sendblue account/webhook readback; source and tests remain topology evidence only.

upstash.finding: No local Upstash CLI or authenticated readback capability was available.
upstash.fallback: HGI-303 records an authenticated database/configuration metadata readback; no value, key, or live persistence claim follows from source.

secrets.finding: A local 1Password CLI exists, but no named vault/item, target-owned procedure, or authority was supplied for this decision task.
secrets.fallback: HGI-303 records a metadata-only, redacted secret-binding readback under an approved target-owned runbook; never read or print secret values.

limitations: All provider findings are read-only capability observations at observedAt and grant neither approval nor mutation authority.
No provider, GitHub setting, secret, deployment, webhook, message, or credential was mutated.
GitHub repository settings cannot establish Eve Production state or long-term automated-review effectiveness.
nonClaims: Eve is not claimed live, deployed, configured, webhook-registered, credential-bound, or production-ready.
No Claude review conclusion, secret presence, provider binding, or external operation success is established.
